keys.meta_description: Check-in, roster, analytics, and policy-aware attendance with approval workflows.
keys.hero_description: Mobile check-in, manager views, and live analytics.
keys.sections_0_body: Paper tools miss late arrivals until payroll.
keys.sections_1_body: Attendance shares Leave and Approval history.
keys.sections_2_body: Automation flags patterns before payroll locks.
keys.sections_3_body: Live truth while fixes are still cheap.
keys.faq_0_a: Employees open the mobile app and tap check-in. GPS, IP, or QR validation rules can be configured per location. The record syncs instantly to the manager roster view.
keys.faq_1_q: What happens if an employee forgets to check in?
keys.faq_1_a: Automation can flag the gap and notify the employee or manager within a configurable window. Manual corrections are logged with a reason and approval.
keys.faq_2_a: Yes. Attendance records feed directly into payroll calculations, so discrepancies are visible before pay runs rather than after.
keys.faq_3_q: Can we start small and expand?
keys.faq_3_a: Yes. Turn on modules as you grow—HR, finance, analytics, and workflow blocks scale together.
keys.faq_4_a: Use the Pricing page for tiers; Enterprise adds SLA, scale, and governance options.
keys.faq_5_q: How do I get a demo?
keys.faq_5_a: Use Talk to sales or Book demo from the header—our team can align Automation and Scheduler to your process.
keys.faq_6_a: Contact our team for a walkthrough tailored to your workflow.
keys.faq_7_a: Contact our team for a walkthrough tailored to your workflow.
